subject: Re: Invoice YCCP-41 - Resolution of Volume Dispute
body:
Dear Raj Mehta,

Thank you for your dispute regarding invoice YCCP-41 for Captain Morgan Tiki Mango & P/Apple 700ML (Week 202612).

We have conducted a thorough review of the sales data and promotion agreement on file. Our analysis confirms that the invoice calculation is correct and accurate.

**Invoice Details - YCCP-41:**
- **Product:** Captain Morgan Tiki Mango & P/Apple 700ML (TPNB 87742417)
- **Sales Period:** Week 202612
- **Actual Sales Volume:** 10 units
- **Agreed Funding Rate:** £0.20 per unit
- **Calculated Total Funding:** 10 units × £0.20 = **£2.00** ex-VAT

**Supporting Evidence:**
Our system records confirm that 10 units were sold in week 202612 for this product by your organization (supplier ID 60198). This is verified against our sales table which shows a confirmed sales value of £158.14 ex-VAT. The promotion agreement (Ref: 98829437) confirms the agreed funding rate of £0.20 per unit, valid from 2026-03-11 to 2026-05-26.

Your claim of 8 units sold (totaling £1.60) is not supported by the sales data in our system. The invoice remains valid at **£2.00** as calculated.

If you have additional evidence that contradicts our system records, please provide it within 10 business days for further review.

Best regards,

**Tesco Margin Discovery Team**
Calculation ID: YCCP-41
